final_prompt.prompt:
Design a premium organic matcha product line packaging mockup for four products arranged on a light wood surface.

Style/medium: commercial product photography blended with design visualization, editorial packaging mockup, Japanese minimalism meets contemporary design
Composition: top-down flat lay arrangement of four products in a grid, 50mm lens, sharp focus across all packaging, generous negative space
Subject: four matcha products (matcha powder tin, matcha chocolate box, matcha cookie tin, matcha tea bag box) with hand-drawn matcha plantation illustrations, serif and handwritten typography in Chinese/English/Japanese
Scene/backdrop: light wood tabletop surface, fresh tea leaves and matcha powder scattered as decorative accents
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural daylight from upper left, clean and airy, premium gift-market atmosphere
Color palette: layered matcha greens as dominant, warm off-white as base, gold foil details as accent
Materials/textures: matte paper stock with subtle Japanese traditional pattern underprint, elegant line illustrations
Text (verbatim): "食品包装设计效果图" "抹茶粉" "抹茶巧克力" "抹茶饼干" "抹茶茶包"
Constraints: all four products must be visible and equally weighted; packaging surfaces must show texture detail; multilingual typography must be legible
Avoid: plastic sheen, oversaturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, cluttered composition, 8K stuffer language
